title: Did You Hear the One About the Traveling Saleslady?
writer: James Fritzell, Everett Greenbaum, John Fenton Murray
actors: Phyllis Diller, Bob Denver, Joe Flynn
plot: Agatha Knabenshu arrives in a small town in Missouri to sell player pianos to the locals. She's fired after her disastrous sales attempts nearly destroy the town. The stranded saleslady becomes friendly with an equally bumbling in...
